title: Thusharagiri Falls
tagline: Thusharagiri Falls — heritage city of Kerala

overview.short: Thusharagiri Falls is a waterfall located in Kozhikode district in the Indian state of Kerala, India.
overview.description: Thusharagiri Falls is a waterfall located in Kozhikode district in the Indian state of Kerala, India. Two streams originating from the Western Ghats meet here to form the Chalippuzha River. The river diverges into three waterfalls creating a snowy spray, which gives the name, 'Thusharagiri' a word which means the snow-capped mountain. Of the three waterfalls, the highest is the Thenpara, falling from an altitude of 75 metres (246 ft).

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Chembukkadavu Weir
topPlaces.description: Chembukkadavu Weir is a small diversion dam constructed across Chalipuzha in Kodenchery village of Kozhikode district in Kerala, India. The location of the scheme is at Chembukadavu near Tusharagiri in Kodencherry village of Kozhikode district.

topPlaces.name: Nellipoyil
topPlaces.description: Nellipoyil is a village and is part of Kodancherry Panchayat in Kozhikode district in the state of Kerala, India. Nearest Places are Kodencheri, Thiruvambady, Thamarassery, Thusharagiri Falls.

topPlaces.name: Aripara Falls
topPlaces.description: Aripara Falls [alternate spelling: Arippara Falls (അരിപ്പാറ)] is a tourist spot in Anakkampoyil near Thiruvambady Town in Kozhikode district, Kerala. It is located on the Thiruvambady - Anakkampoyil route, 15 km from Thiruvambadi.

topPlaces.name: Anakkampoyil
topPlaces.description: Anakkampoil is a hill Village in Kozhikode district in Kerala, India. is located about 50 km from the Kozhikode situated at the foothills of Vellarimala.

topPlaces.name: Thamarassery Churam
topPlaces.description: Thamarassery Churam is a mountain pass located in Kozhikode District in Kerala, India across the Western Ghats. "Churam" is the Malayalam word for mountain pass.

topPlaces.name: Markaz Knowledge City
topPlaces.description: Markaz Knowledge City is a private, planned city built near Kozhikode in Kerala. The foundation stone for the project was laid by Taj-ul Ulama Sayyid Abdurrahman Albukhari on 24 December 2012.

topPlaces.name: Jamiul Futuh
topPlaces.description: The Jamiul Futuh, officially known as the Jāmi'ul Futūh, and also known as The Indian Grand Masjid and the Shahre Mubarak Grand Mosque, is a Shafi‘i Sunni mosque, located in Markaz Knowledge City, in the Kozhikode district of the state of Kerala, in the south of India. It is the largest mosque in Kerala and can accommodate up to 25,000 worshippers.

topPlaces.name: Chembra Peak
topPlaces.description: Chembra Peak (Chembra Mala) is a mountain in the state of Kerala, India, with an elevation of 2,100 m (6,890 ft) above sea level. The highest peak in the Wayanad hills and one of the highest peaks in the Western Ghats, adjoining the Nilgiri Hills and Vellarimala, it is located in the Wayanad district and Malappuram district in Kerala, near Kalpetta town and Nilambur taluk.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Thusharagiri Falls?
faq.a: The best time to visit Thusharagiri Falls is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Thusharagiri Falls?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Calicut International Airport, Kozhikode (39 km) and the nearest railway station is Coimbatore Junction (112 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Thusharagiri Falls?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Thusharagiri Falls at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Thusharagiri Falls?
faq.a: Stays in Thusharagiri Falls start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Thusharagiri Falls?
faq.a: The top attractions are Chembukkadavu Weir, Nellipoyil, Aripara Falls, Anakkampoyil, Thamarassery Churam.
